manifest.description: Two-way sync between Paperclip projects and a Linear workspace. Pick which Paperclip project links to which Linear project; new Paperclip issues push to the linked Linear project, Linear issues that carry a configured label are imported back so agents can pick them up.
manifest.author: Paperclip

apiKey.title: Linear API Key
apiKey.description: Paste your Linear personal API key here (Linear → Settings → API → Personal API keys). Stored encrypted at rest. For stronger isolation, use apiKeyRef instead.

apiKeyRef.title: Linear API Key (secret ref)
apiKeyRef.description: Optional: reference an entry in the Paperclip secret provider instead of pasting the key above.

webhookSecret.title: Linear Webhook Signing Secret
webhookSecret.description: Paste the HMAC SHA-256 signing secret Linear shows when you create the webhook.

paperclipPublicUrl.title: Paperclip Public URL
paperclipPublicUrl.description: Public origin of this Paperclip instance (e.g. https://paperclipai.example.com). Used to compose the Linear webhook URL the plugin auto-provisions. Trailing slashes are stripped.

pushPaperclipIssues.title: Push new Paperclip issues to Linear

pushPaperclipDocuments.title: Mirror Paperclip documents (e.g. plans) to Linear comments
pushPaperclipDocuments.description: When agents create or update an issue document like the plan, post or update a single Linear comment with the document body so it shows up in the Linear thread.

importLinearIssues.title: Import labelled Linear issues into Paperclip

importLabelName.title: Import label
importLabelName.description: Linear label name that gates imports — only Linear issues with this label are pulled into Paperclip. The plugin auto-creates the label on first sync.

jobs.description: Refresh cached Linear teams, projects, and labels; reconcile mapped projects.
Pull labelled Linear issues updated since the last cursor, per linked project.

webhooks.description: Receives create/update/remove events from Linear for issues and comments. Configure this URL inside Linear → Settings → API → Webhooks.

tools.name: create-linear-issue
tools.description: Creates a new issue in Linear. If the agent's current Paperclip project is linked to a Linear project, the issue is created there.

paperclipProjectId.description: Optional Paperclip project UUID. When provided, resolves the linked Linear project automatically.

paperclipIssueId.description: Optional Paperclip issue UUID. When provided, the resulting Linear issue is linked to it for future bidirectional sync.

tools.name: search-linear-issues
tools.description: Searches Linear for issues matching a query string and returns identifier/title/url for the top matches.
